data.title: EIG Holds Initial Closing of Fund Focused on Geothermal Power Projects
data.description: Today, EIG, a prominent institutional investor in the global energy and infrastructure industries, disclosed the launch of EIG Geothermal Catalyst Partners (the “Fund”). This dedicated investment platform is specifically aimed at backing the growth of upcoming geothermal projects in the United States. The Fund's main objective is to offer mid-stage development funding to facilitate the progress of geothermal projects by meeting essential technical and commercial milestones. This announcement marks the initial closing of the Fund, which signals the beginning of its operations in investing in the geothermal sector in the U.S.

data.title: APi Group Confirms Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release
data.description: A corporation based in New Brighton, Minnesota, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) disclosed its plan to unveil financial outcomes for the quarter closing on March 31, 2026, before the market opens on April 30, 2026. Scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, the First Quarter Earnings Conference Call by APi is set to be a webcast/dial-in affair. Among the participants on the call will be Russell A. Becker, the President and Chief Executive Officer of APi Group Corporation.

data.title: GROWMARK Launches AI Agronomy Agent in myFS Agronomy Platform
data.description: In Bloomington, Illinois, GROWMARK, Inc. has introduced a cutting-edge artificial intelligence (AI) agent in its myFS Agronomy app for the upcoming 2026 crop season. This innovative technology merges live data analysis with extensive knowledge gathered by crop experts over many years. The AI agent offers rapid and accurate agronomic advice, empowering GROWMARK’s FS members and their specialists to offer tailored recommendations to farmers. This advancement aims to enhance agricultural practices by delivering more effective solutions to boost crop yields.

data.title: Valvoline Instant Oil Change℠ Named One of the Fastest-Growing Franchises of 2026 by Entrepreneur
data.description: Valvoline Inc., a leader in preventive automotive maintenance, has been acknowledged as one of the Fastest-Growing Franchises by Entrepreneur magazine in 2026. Climbing from No. 41 to No. 21 compared to last year, the company secured the top spot in its category on the list. This marks the second consecutive year of recognition for Valvoline Instant Oil Change, showcasing the robustness of its franchise system. The company’s stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol VVV.

data.title: Virax Biolabs' CEO James Foster Outlines Strategic Priorities and Near-Term Milestones in Letter to Shareholders
data.description: Virax Biolabs is implementing a targeted plan with a primary focus on ViraxImmune™ and entering the U.S. market. The company's management feels that this strategy, along with its strong balance sheet, lack of debt, recent funding, and operational advancements, is not adequately recognized in its current public valuation.

data.title: TPG to Acquire Learfield, the Leading College Sports Media Sales and Technology Provider
data.description: In a major deal, TPG, a prominent alternative asset management firm based in Dallas, San Francisco, and Fort Worth, Texas, has revealed the acquisition of Learfield. Learfield, known as the primary media and technology company supporting college athletics in the nation, has been acquired through a definitive agreement. Learfield operates as a significant commercial platform in the global sports arena, utilizing its services as the primary source of monetization for collegiate sports intellectual property. The company has established connections with over 12,000 brands and 1,200 institutions.

data.title: WELL Subsidiary CYBERWELL Launches CYDEcore Fusion Platform and Provides Strategic Business Update to Address Escalating Cybersecurity Threats
data.description: Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF) has shared a positive update on its majority-owned subsidiary, CYBERWELL. The digital healthcare company is focused on utilizing technology to support healthcare practitioners and patients worldwide. CYBERWELL has emphasized its unified operating model, unique platform features, essential certifications, and recent leadership appointments. This news showcases the commitment of WELL Health Technologies Corp. to enhancing healthcare experiences globally.

data.description: Two press releases, one in English and the other in French, are scheduled to be published on April 14, 2026, at 7:30 am.

data.title: Anavex Life Sciences Highlights New Scientific Findings on Shared Biology Between Autism and Alzheimer’s Disease
data.description: Research results strongly support Anavex's strategic focus on utilizing orally administered blarcamesine for targeted autophagy.

data.title: Sanara MedTech Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 12, 2026
data.description: Fort Worth, Texas - Sanara MedTech Inc., a medical technology company traded on Nasdaq under SMTI, will disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 12, 2026, before the opening of the U.S. financial markets. Sanara specializes in advancing innovative technologies to enhance clinical results and lower healthcare costs within the surgical sector.

data.title: Domestic Metals Announces Closing of Final Tranche of Private Placement and Announces $7.0 million Financing
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 14, 2026, Domestic Metals Corp. shared updates on their recent financial activities. The company, known as "Domestic," and traded as TSXV: DMCU; OTCQB: DMCUF; FSE: 03E0, announced the completion of the final phase of a private placement offering. This involved the issuance of 874,286 units at a price of $0.28 per unit, resulting in total earnings of $244,800.08. This development follows previous announcements made by the company on February 4, March 13, 2026, and March 24, 2026.

data.title: Full Truck Alliance Co. Ltd. Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Guiyang, China, on April 14, 2026, Full Truck Alliance Co. Ltd. (NYSE: YMM), a prominent digital freight platform, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The report is available for viewing on the Company's investor relations website at ir.fulltruckalliance.com. Shareholders and ADS holders can obtain a complimentary hard copy of the annual report inclusive of audited consolidated financial statements. For further details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Profound Medical to Participate in the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Profound Medical Corp. (NASDAQ: PROF; TSX: PRN) disclosed that it will provide a business update at the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference on April 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time in Metro Toronto Convention Centre. Profound is a medical device company specializing in AI-powered, MRI-guided therapies for ablating diseased tissue. The conference will offer insights into the Company's progress and future prospects to potential investors.

data.title: BlackRock Assets Hit Record $13.9 Trillion, CEO Calls It 'One Of The Strongest Starts Ever'
data.description: BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) released its first-quarter fiscal 2026 results, surpassing Wall Street projections with revenue reaching $6.70 billion, marking a 27% increase from the previous year and surpassing the predicted $6.46 billion. The adjusted operating income also showed growth, rising by 31% to $2.70 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were reported at $12.53, an 11% climb from the previous year and exceeding estimates of $11.62. Investment advisory, administration fees, and securities lending revenue also grew significantly, climbing to $5.44 billion from $4.40 billion the year before. Notably, organic base fees saw an 8% increase, the most robust first-quarter performance in five years, further supported by favorable market effects on average assets under management and around $230 million in other...
